description: Upgrade the Bologna Pasubio scenario at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/ from a vehicle-only simulation to a multi-modal one. Create a new demand file named pedestrians.rou.xml containing at least 10 persons who perform multi-stage trips: walking to a bus stop, riding the bus line defined in the scenario, and walking to a final destination. Update the configuration file run.sumocfg to include this new demand and configure it to generate person information output at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/personinfo.xml. Run the simulation to completion to generate the output.
